items.name: DEPA-4 "Rhino" Helmet
items.description: Mark 4 helmet of the DEPA (Deep Excavation Power Armor) Series. Originally used by miners in the deep, hostile depths of the earth. Built in air cycling system, shock absorbers, thermal imaging; the Rhino can provide the utility you need to survive down under.
